display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
2. Record started event and
open log

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Hourly user-level scheduler
and oneshot service that run
the backup at minute 45 and
route failures to the
notifier.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
scripts/workflow-backup.sh
coordinates one backup run:
locking, logging, pre/post
guard checks, WSL rsync,
SQLite snapshots, Windows
sync, run-ledger updates, and
NAS manifest publication.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Creates
application-consistent copies
of Hermes, lifelog,
browser-memory, and related
SQLite databases using
sqlite3 backup API; can
quick_check copies.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Read-only ZFS budget check
that enforces dataset-used,
snapshot-held, free-space,
and snapshot-count limits
before/after writes.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div: [Container: SQLite + JSON + logs on WSL filesystem]

Local status, logs, SQLite
run ledger, exported
run-history JSON, SQLite
snapshot cache, and Windows
manifest cache under
~/.local/state/workstation-workflow-backup.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Workflow-critical WSL paths:
~/repos, ~/.hermes, ~/.ssh,
systemd user config,
lifelog/browser-memory data,
and optional brain-code tree.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Encrypted TrueNAS dataset
v1/ws1/wf with current mirror
tree, manifests, SMB share
ws1-wf, and ZFS snapshot
history.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div: TrueNAS Middleware and ZFS Control Plane

root@10.99.98.221 management
surface used for ZFS
properties, snapshot tasks,
SMB share configuration, and
verification.
